lede: A look at December 3 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Julius Honka and Manuel Arana, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2024 South Korean martial law crisis
events.desc: Martial law is declared in South Korea.

events.title: 2009 Hotel Shamo bombing
events.desc: A suicide bombing at a hotel in Mogadishu, Somalia, kills 25 people, including three ministers of the Transitional Federal Government.

events.title: NASA
events.desc: NASA loses radio contact with the Mars Polar Lander moments before the spacecraft enters the Martian atmosphere.

events.title: Worcester, Massachusetts
events.desc: In Worcester, Massachusetts, firefighters responded to a fire at the Worcester Cold Storage and Warehouse Co. facility, which takes the lives of 6 firefighters.

events.title: Bhopal disaster
events.desc: Bhopal disaster: A methyl isocyanate leak from a Union Carbide pesticide plant in Bhopal, India, kills more than 3,800 people outright and injures 150,000–600,000 others (some 6,000 of whom later died from their injuries) in one of the worst industrial disasters in history.

events.title: Soviet Union
events.desc: Soviet Union, Space probe of the Luna program, called Luna 8, is launched, but crashes on the Moon.

events.title: Flag of Singapore
events.desc: The current flag of Singapore is adopted, six months after Singapore became self-governing within the British Empire.

events.title: Turkish invasion of Armenia
events.desc: Following more than a month of Turkish–Armenian War, the Turkish-dictated Treaty of Alexandropol is concluded.

events.title: Henry Townsend (missionary)
events.desc: Nigeria's first newspaper, missionary Henry Townsend's Iwe Irohin, was published.

events.title: War of the Second Coalition
events.desc: War of the Second Coalition: Battle of Wiesloch: Austrian Lieutenant Field Marshal Anton Sztáray defeats the French at Wiesloch.

births.name: Adam Małysz
births.line: Polish ski jumper and race car driver

births.name: Andrew Stanton
births.line: American voice actor, director, producer, screenwriter

births.name: Mike Stock
births.line: English songwriter, record producer, and musician

deaths.text: Lewis Thomas, American physician, etymologist, and academic
Jean Tixier de Ravisi, French scholar and academic

observances.text: Christian feast day: Pope Abraham of Alexandria (Coptic, 6 Koiak))
Christian feast day: Emma (of Lesum or of Bremen)
Christian feast day: Blessed Johann Nepomuk von Tschiderer zu Gleifheim
